title: National Gas and Gravitricity Secure Â£500,000 to Develop Underground Hydrogen Storage
content: National Gas, an independent UK gas supplier, has secured Â£500,000 from Ofgemâ€™s Strategic Innovation Fund to develop H2FlexiStore, a pioneering underground hydrogen storage system that promises to advance hydrogen fuel cell integration and the UKâ€™s net-zero ambitions. Developed in collaboration with Edinburgh-based Gravitricity, the project will design and model a system to store up to 100 tonnes of green hydrogen in purpose-built lined shafts, potentially revolutionizing how hydrogen fuel is stored and distributed.
author: Analysts Account
